scripts.spelling:regression: rm -rf .tmp/spelling-regression && npx tsc --outDir .tmp/spelling-regression --rootDir . --module commonjs --target es2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --noEmit false scripts/spelling-regression.ts && node .tmp/spelling-regression/scripts/spelling-regression.js
scripts.rewards:recurring-regression: rm -rf .tmp/recurring-reward-regression && npx tsc --outDir .tmp/recurring-reward-regression --rootDir . --module commonjs --target es2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --noEmit false scripts/recurring-reward-config-regression.ts && node .tmp/recurring-reward-regression/scripts/recurring-reward-config-regression.js
